properties.name: --blog-post-animation
properties.description: The duration of the animation for \`:focus\`, \`:hover\`, \`:focus-within\`, and \`:focus-visible\` states

properties.name: --blog-post-primary-text-color
properties.description: The color of the primary text

properties.name: --blog-post-container-color
properties.description: The color of the container, {@link MdElevatedCard} and {@link --md-elevated-card-container-color}

properties.name: --blog-post-word-tag-container-color
properties.description: The color of the container, {@link WordTag}

properties.name: --connect-dialog-content-transition
properties.description: The animation duration for expanding/collapsing connection details.

properties.name: --fab-menu-item-direction
properties.description: The `flex-direction` of the {@link FabMenuItem}

properties.name: --fab-menu-item-justify
properties.description: The Flex `justify-content` of the {@link FabMenuItem}

properties.name: --fab-menu-item-padding-end
properties.description: The logical `padding-inline-end` value

properties.name: --fab-menu-item-padding-start
properties.description: The logical `padding-inline-start` value

properties.name: --fab-menu-transition-duration
properties.description: The duration of the menu's opening and closing animations

properties.name: --fab-menu-animation-spec
properties.description: The animation spec for {@link FabMenu} `transition`s

properties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation
properties.description: The duration of the icon's fill and color transition.

properties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation-reduced
properties.description: The duration of the icon's transition when motion is reduced.

properties.name: --word-cloud-animation
properties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.

properties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced
properties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.

properties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size
properties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).

properties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height
properties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size
properties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height
properties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size
properties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height
properties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size
properties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).

properties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height
properties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.

properties.name: --word-tag-color
properties.description: The text and border color

properties.name: --word-tag-background-color
properties.description: The background color

properties.name: --word-tag-font-family
properties.description: The font family

properties.name: --word-tag-font-size
properties.description: The font size

properties.name: --word-tag-font-weight
properties.description: The font weight

properties.name: --word-tag-line-height
properties.description: The line height

properties.name: --word-tag-border-radius
properties.description: The corner radius (for all corners)
